Title: Definitive abstract claim
Abstract
This study demonstrates definitively that the intervention causes better outcomes.
Methods
Participants (N = 73) were randomized to a control group and an intervention group.
Results
The effect was significant, p = 0.04.
Discussion
The data suggest some caution despite the observed result.
References
Doe, J. (2011). Example. https://doi.org/10.1000/example24
